THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE EDUCATION RESOURCES INSTITUTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EROY, ARIAN $11,690.90 PRINCIPAL, $1,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,330.55 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,931.45, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF THE EDUCATION RESOURCES INSTITUTE

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT ARIAN EROY'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS REQUIRED TO PAY $25 PER PAY PERIOD UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS PAID. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR #5976

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hrg On Claim Of Exemption; Notice
Off Calendar Jul-17-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Arian Eroy, defendant/claimant, appearing on her own behalf.

No other appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Arian Eroy's Claim Of Exemption is granted in part. The judgment debtor is required to pay $25 per pay period until the judgment is paid. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976
